item.title: Sony Music [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Sony Music [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: meoify
item.itunes:summary:
Sony Music
(Utilities)
The Music application from Sony makes listening to your music files a wonderful experience. Import your music, arrange in playlists and just listen and enjoy. We optimize the sound and restrict the power used, so you can listen for as long as you want.

item.title: SD Card Retrieval Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SD Card Retrieval Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
SD Card Retrieval Software
(Utilities)
Company offers Mac memory card recovery application at recovermac.us that facilitates person to easily and securely reform digital media files and office documents once stored on your removable media storage drives lost accidentally due to logical corruption of MMC cards. Powerful and effective data recovery Mac memory card program provides most convenient graphical user interface for ease of novice person having complete manual guide throughout files scanning and restoration process so even non-technical user can also handle without requiring any special technical guidance. Efficient Mac memory card recovery software revives digital data and multimedia files from removable media storage cards of all major manufacturer brands of MMC cards including Samsung, Kingston, HP, Sony, Transcend, Cannon, Olympus, Toshiba and many others. Versatile memory card lost data recovery application at recovermac.us recreates pictures, music, images, videos and document data from all type of removable media storage drives including mini SD cards, MMC cards, secure digital cards, micro SD cards, memory stick duo and similar media devices. Mac memory card recover program provides user finest option for retrieving lost files and folders by allowing person to have preview of document and multimedia files in special preview pane before restoring data at specified memory location of Apple Macintosh computer machines. Digital data recovery memory card Mac software rescue lost files executing on all versions of Mac OSX like Mac 10.7, Mac 10.4, Mac 10.6, Mac 10.5 and others.Features:* Data recovery memory card software provides simple graphical interface with complete manual guide.* Removable media cards data rescue program supports inaccessible and virus corrupted memory cards.* Mac memory card recovery software revives crashed pictures, music, video and office document files.

[read more]
item.description:
SD Card Retrieval Software
(Utilities)
Company offers Mac memory card recovery application at recovermac.us that facilitates person to easily and securely reform digital media files and office documents once stored on your removable media storage drives lost accidentally due to logical corruption of MMC cards. Powerful and effective data recovery Mac memory card program provides most convenient graphical user interface for ease of novice person having complete manual guide throughout files scanning and restoration process so even non-technical user can also handle without requiring any special technical guidance. Versatile memory card lost data recovery application at recovermac.us recreates pictures, music, images, videos and document data from all type of removable media storage drives including mini SD cards, MMC cards, secure digital cards, micro SD cards, memory stick duo and similar media devices. Mac memory card recover program provides user finest option for retrieving lost files and folders by allowing person to have preview of document and multimedia files in special preview pane before restoring data at specified memory location of Apple Macintosh computer machines. [read more]

item.title: Professional Mobile SMS Software Free [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Professional Mobile SMS Software Free [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: smssoftware1
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Mobile SMS Software Free
(Office Apps)
Visit www.smssoftware.org to send bulk SMS to friends mobile without any cost. Mobile SMS Software Free is used to send limitless message from pc to mobile phone. SMS sending tool is used in companies to send text to employee related to product, event, etc. and also used in colleges and schools to inform student about examination, interviews and holidays.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Video Retrieval Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Video Retrieval Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Video Retrieval Program
(Utilities)
Has your precious photographs been lost or inaccessible as a result of a virus attack on storage media? Company will provide you convenient solution for this by presenting Mac photo recovery free software which capable in salvage of all missing photos and snapshots from memory card or damaged digital camera in simplified manner. With the help of Apple Mac digital picture recovery application all class of users efficiently rescue all important photographs and videos that clicks on various unforgettable moments with their family from logically corrupted camcorder. Rich quality Mac digital camera rescue software provides comprehensive and straight forward solution for recovery and restoration of corrupted birthday images, wedding video, baby audio and favorite pictures from any manufacturers brand handy cam in less span of time. Extraordinary featured digicam restoration utility for Mac successful brings back all inaccessible and damaged jpg, tiff, png or jpeg extensions pictures files from Mac trash. Innovative Mac photo recovery free software specially designed by suing various advance techniques that easily scan all corrupted or virus infected storage media to efficiently regain all digital pictures without any extra efforts.Features:* Mac photo recovery free software empower to restore all images even if any system generated error messages is pop up on Mac OS X installed machine while connecting digital camera.* Mac photo recovery free utility fully competent with different kinds of digital camera including Point and shoot camera, Specialty camera, Digital Video camera etc. * Mac digital camera recovery software developed with inbuilt disk scanning mechanism to find and rescue all missing images.

[read more]

Digital Camera Video Retrieval Program
(Utilities)

[read more]

item.title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.description:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]

"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]

item.title: Bulk SMS for Windows mobile phone [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS for Windows mobile phone [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: smssoftware1
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS for Windows mobile phone
(Office Apps)
Download innovative bulk SMS application and conveniently forward text messages saved in your cell phone memory via computer system having support for all major windows mobile phone manufacturer brands including Samsung, Motorola, HTC etc. Powerful and efficient bulk text messages publishing software allow user to send SMS to desired number of contacts retrieved from cell phonebook memory, to contacts stored in excel format files in computer hard disk, manually entered from text bar, mobile memory saved customized user group etc. Affordable bulk SMS application provides option of message delayed delivery for improving message delivery status by pausing transmission according to customized settings resulting in reduced network congestion load and better publicity of your business product to targeted audience. Professional bulk text message sending program allows user with facility to send personal greeting text as standard messages or business product/services information specific notification SMS with option of automatically storing sent messages in computer memory for future usage. Advanced bulk SMS application for windows mobile phone allows user to browse and synchronize text messages saved in cell memory with feature to read, edit, compose using finest editor having no character spacing limitations, send and forward text to desired number of national/international mobile contacts in minimal duration of time span within few simple mouse clicks from your Windows OS installed computer machine.Features:* Text messages publishing software sends mass amount of business news to desired mobile contacts.*SMS sending tool provides simple to access interface having absolute guide manual for novice user.* Bulk SMS application skips duplicate entry from recipients list caused due to multiple contact sources.* Windows mobile SMS software provides option of delayed delivery improving product service publicity.

[read more]
item.description:
Bulk SMS for Windows mobile phone
(Office Apps)
Download innovative bulk SMS application and conveniently forward text messages saved in your cell phone memory via computer system having support for all major windows mobile phone manufacturer brands including Samsung, Motorola, HTC etc. Powerful and efficient bulk text messages publishing software allow user to send SMS to desired number of contacts retrieved from cell phonebook memory, to contacts stored in excel format files in computer hard disk, manually entered from text bar, mobile memory saved customized user group etc. Affordable bulk SMS application provides option of message delayed delivery for improving message delivery status by pausing transmission according to customized settings resulting in reduced network congestion load and better publicity of your business product to targeted audience. item.title: anymeal [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: anymeal [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: wedesoft
item.itunes:summary:
anymeal
(Utilities)
AnyMeal is a free recipe database software developed using SQLite3 and Qt5. It can manage a cookbook with more than 250,000 recipes, thereby allowing to import, export, search, display, edit, and print them. AnyMeal is available for GNU/Linux and Microsoft Windows.

[read more]
item.description:
anymeal
(Utilities)
AnyMeal is a free recipe database software developed using SQLite3 and Qt5. It can manage a cookbook with more than 250,000 recipes, thereby allowing to import, export, search, display, edit, and print them. AnyMeal is available for GNU/Linux and Microsoft Windows.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
anymeal
(Utilities)
AnyMeal is a free recipe database software developed using SQLite3 and Qt5. It can manage a cookbook with more than 250,000 recipes, thereby allowing to import, export, search, display, edit, and print them. AnyMeal is available for GNU/Linux and Microsoft Windows.

[read more]

item.title: Professional Mac Device Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional Mac Device Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Mac Device Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Lost data from Mac hard drives! Take advantage of Macintosh DDR professional recovery software to retrieve inaccessible files and folders from Mac HFS and HFS + drives in less span of time. Download freeware Mac data recovery program to regain favorite collection of music, movie or other media files from any corrupted or formatted storage media in few seconds. Apple Macintosh OS X undelete application professionally capable in recovery of important documents from memory card that not recognized by PC due to any reasons. Apple Mac data rescue program restore all lost or misplaced data due to Master Directory Block, Volume Header Corruption, Extents Overflow file corruption, Catalog File's node corruption, Bad Sector in the disk, Accidental deletion, formatted storage media, Virus/worm attacks, or any other reasons. Affordable Recover Mac software exclusively designed for those who want to regain all lost memorable images and photographs from storage media at reasonable price. Technically powerful Recover Mac utility efficiently and effectively retrieve lost text, media or picture files and folders from Multimedia storage devices in few easy steps. Mac DDR Recovery Software professionally capable in get back intentionally or unintentionally formatted Compact flash card data and documents in fraction of time. Recover Mac application easily restore mp3, mp4, mpeg etc music files from logically crashed hard drive in simplified manner.Features:* Undelete Mac software empowers with preview facility that allow user to take a look on recovered documents before actual recovery.* Advance Mac data rescue program smoothly supports all type of digital storage devices, drive and media including Mac hard drives, pen drives, Portable media players, Memory sticks, Mobile devices, digital camera etc.

[read more]

Professional Mac Device Recovery Tool

item.title: Weeom MBOX to PST Converter Tool [File Management]
item.itunes:title: Weeom MBOX to PST Converter Tool [File Management]
item.itunes:author: deepakweeom
item.itunes:summary:
Weeom MBOX to PST Converter Tool
(File Management)
Weeom MBOX to PST Converter Tool is a robust and user-friendly solution designed to facilitate the seamless conversion of MBOX files to PST format. This tool is particularly useful for users looking to migrate their email data from clients like Thunderbird, Apple Mail, and other MBOX-supported applications to Microsoft Outlook. Key features of Weeom MBOX to PST Converter include its intuitive interface, making the conversion process accessible to users with varying technical expertise. The tool supports batch conversion, allowing users to process multiple MBOX files simultaneously, saving time and effort. This tool ensures data integrity during the conversion, preserving email attachments, folder structures, and metadata for users. The software also provides flexibility by allowing users to selectively choose specific MBOX files or folders for conversion. Additionally, the tool supports a wide range of MBOX variations, ensuring compatibility with various email clients. The conversion process is quick and efficient, and the resulting PST files can be easily imported into Microsoft Outlook for a seamless transition.
Overall, Weeom MBOX to PST Converter Tool offers a free trial version for users, so that they can convert their first 50 data items from MBOX to PST without any glitch.

[read more]
